title: Meadow's Shiny Tiny Tools
description: Embellished, downsized tools designed for PvP or simply a clean, aesthetic experience
body:
**Enhance your gaming experience with a cleaner, more aesthetic look.**

This pack offers:

- **Downsized Textures**: Shorter tools and weapons for maximum visibility during PvP and PvE (_includes swords, axes, pickaxes, shovels, hoes, spears, the fishing rod and the mace_)
- **Polished Finishes**: A sleek, vibrant look (_for all copper, iron, gold, netherite, and diamond tools and weapons_)
- **Subtle Ornaments**: Elegant details on your main tools while staying true to the vanilla style (_for all metal tools and weapons_)
- **Unique Shapes**: Subtle overhauled tool shapes for more realisticy (_for all wooden tools and weapons_)
- **Excellent Color Consistency**: Ensures color consistency across all material and tools (_for all metal and diamond tools; in parts also for stone and wooden tools and weapons_)

**2.0 Update:**
This pack ensures excellent color consistency across all ingots and tools. For added realism, wooden tools feature unique shapes, while stone tools have a more natural, rugged texture. Additionally, spear shapes have been overhauled, and Netherite gear now sports a darkened finish to maintain a cohesive look.

**3.0 Update:**
Cleaner anchors, even shorter swords. **More features will come soon!**
